docket_entries.description: STIPULATION FOR HEARING BEFORE JUDGE PRO TEM BRAD KAPLAN FILED BY C.R. REICHEL ENGINEERING CO. INC. TROPHY PROPERTIES IV B8A-2, LLC
DECLARATION OF APPEARANCE ON BEHALF OF CORPORATION PURSUANT TO CCP 116.540 (B)-(H) FILED BY PLAINTIFF C.R. REICHEL ENGINEERING CO. INC.
DECLARATION OF APPEARANCE ON BEHALF OF CORPORATION PURSUANT TO CCP 116.540 (B)-(H) FILED BY DEFENDANT TROPHY PROPERTIES IV B8A-2, LLC

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF C.R. REICHEL ENGINEERING CO. INC. RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT TROPHY PROPERTIES IV B8A-2, LLC $4,527.60 PRINCIPAL, $50.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $4,577.60, $2,263.80 ON OR BEFORE OCTOBER 15, 2009. DEFENDANT SHALL FURTHER PAY PLAINTIFF $2,263.80 ON OR BEFORE NOVEMBER 16, 2009. IF EITHER PAYMENT IS MISSED, THE ENTIRE BALANCE BECOMES DUE IMMEDIATELY. ANY BALANCE REMAINING UNPAID AFTER NOVEMBER 16, 2009 SHALL ACCURE INTEREST AT THE RATE OF 10% PER ANNUM. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED
SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF SEP-24-2009 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF SEP-24-2009 BY JUDGE PRO TEM: BRAD KAPLAN. APPEARANCE BY BOTH PARTIES. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. CLERK: S. VANTREE. NOT REPORTED. (506)
